summary: Comprehensive testing of Customer Reviews System and Email Confirmation features. All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/products returns 39 products with slugs
Backend: /api/products/calming-dog-bed/reviews returns list of reviews with correct structure (id, product_id, user_id, user_name, rating, title, content, helpful_count, created_at)
Backend: /api/products/calming-dog-bed/reviews/summary returns rating stats (average_rating, total_reviews, rating_breakdown for 5,4,3,2,1 stars)
Backend: /api/reviews/{id}/helpful increments helpful_count correctly
Backend: /api/reviews/{invalid_id}/helpful returns 404
Backend: /api/products/nonexistent/reviews returns 404
Backend: /api/products/nonexistent/reviews/summary returns 404
Backend: POST /api/products/{slug}/reviews requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/products/{slug}/reviews creates review with valid auth, returns bonus_points
Backend: Review rating validation rejects invalid ratings (0 and 6)
Backend: send_order_confirmation_email function exists and handles missing RESEND_API_KEY gracefully
Backend: resend library imported and configured in server.py
Backend: Cart operations (add, get, clear) working correctly
Backend: Promo code validation (WELCOME15) returns valid=true with correct discount
Backend: Checkout endpoint validates empty cart correctly
Backend: Reviews seeded on 10+ products with 50+ total reviews
Frontend: Product detail page shows Customer Reviews section
Frontend: Reviews summary shows average rating (4.7) and rating breakdown bar chart
Frontend: Individual reviews display user name, date, rating stars, title, content, helpful button
Frontend: Write a Review button shows login prompt for unauthenticated users
Frontend: Write a Review form appears for authenticated users with star rating, title input, content textarea
Frontend: Helpful button increments count when clicked (0 → 1)
Frontend: Show All X Reviews button for pagination
Frontend: Cart, promo codes, checkout all working correctly
seed_data_creation: 52 sample reviews seeded across 10 products. Reviews include varying ratings (1-5), verified/unverified purchases, helpful counts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Reviews System fully implemented and tested. Reviews are fetched via /api/products/{slug}/reviews and /api/products/{slug}/reviews/summary. Write review requires auth and awards 10-25 bonus loyalty points. Helpful button uses /api/reviews/{id}/helpful endpoint. Email confirmation uses Resend API - MOCKED (no RESEND_API_KEY configured). The send_order_confirmation_email function exists in server.py around line 1372 and handles missing API key gracefully.

mocked_apis.Resend Email API: RESEND_API_KEY not configured - email function exists but won't send actual emails
mocked_apis.PayPal: Using sandbox mode with client ID 'sb' (from previous iteration)

email_confirmation.template: HTML email template with order details, items, totals, loyalty points

existing_features.cart: Working - add to cart, promo codes, payment methods
existing_features.checkout: Working - Stripe and PayPal options available
